# aikido_teams (Data Source)

Lists all teams in the Aikido workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aikido_teams" "all" {}

output "team_names" {
  value = [for team in data.aikido_teams.all.teams : team.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `teams` (Attributes List) The list of teams. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--teams))

<a id="nestedatt--teams"></a>
### Nested Schema for `teams`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the team is active.
- `external_source` (String) The external source of the team (e.g., github), or null if manually created.
- `external_source_id` (String) The external source identifier for the team.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the team.
- `name` (String) The name of the team.
